cross_team_meta_orchestrator.summary: Top-level /SI router that selects voices ACROSS teams for cross-domain decisions, not just within one team.
cross_team_meta_orchestrator.design: 1) read this meta-registry (team + cell descriptions only, light); 2) classify prompt -> relevant teams (1-4); 3) invoke each selected team's orchestrator with a shared 16-32 cross-team budget weighted by relevance; 4) merged approval gate grouped by team; 5) execute verb, attribution names persona+team. Scores at team+cell granularity first to avoid loading everything.
cross_team_meta_orchestrator.commands: full top-level family: /SI (dispatcher) + /SI-Orchestrate + 15 /SI-<Verb> (all-teams). Per-team /SI-<team>-* remain for scoped use.
cross_team_meta_orchestrator.surface: LOCKED: full /SI family + CoCo-hosted (CoCo NL router invokes /SI-*). Auto-delegate on single-domain; pure-proportional budget.
cross_team_meta_orchestrator.generator: superintelligence/scripts/build_meta_commands.py (reads this meta-registry live; teams auto-join as built flips)
cross_team_meta_orchestrator.status: built 2026-06-01 (17 commands installed; CoCo routing wired). Covers AI+Eng+PD now; Finance/Trading/GRC auto-join on built=true.
